description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. One to two small, dark, objects are visible just above and to the right of the center of the reticle. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B21
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. One to two small, dark, objects are visible just above and to the right of the center of the reticle.
reported_object_description: One to two small, dark, indistinct objects visible just above and to the right of the center of a crosshair reticle.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document consists of a single, low-quality image showing one to two small, dark, and indistinct objects. There are no descriptions of kinematics, behavior, or corroboration from other sensors or witnesses. This aligns with the calibration anchor for a single, low-quality image with no corroborating evidence, making a mundane explanation highly probable.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B21 - Page 1

Document title: FBI Photo B21
Source file: FBI Photo B21.pdf
Page: 1 of 1
Agency: FBI
Release date: 5/8/26
Dataset description: Incident date: Late 2025; Incident location: Western United States

---

[Large black redaction bar spanning the top of the image]

[Three black redaction bars on the left side of the image]

[Central crosshair reticle with a small, dark, indistinct object near the center]

[Three black redaction bars on the right side of the image]

12/31/99 18:19:06
cover_up_reasoning: The document exhibits substantial concealment through extensive black-bar redactions. Large portions of the image, including the top, left, and right sides, are completely obscured. These redactions go beyond routine name/handle redaction and hide significant contextual information about the photo, such as the environment, the platform from which it was taken, or other identifying details.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局 (FBI) 于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室 (AARO) 提交了一份关于未识别异常现象 (UAP) 的报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑删节。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中的日期因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。该单色图像显示出颗粒状纹理，并带有一个中心十字线分划板。分划板中心正上方偏右位置可见一至两个小型、黑暗物体。
reported_object_description_zh: 一至两个小型、黑暗、模糊的物体，位于十字线分划板中心正上方偏右位置。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该排除可能性高，因为该文件仅包含一张低质量图像，显示一至两个小型、黑暗且模糊的物体。没有关于运动学、行为的描述，也无其他传感器或目击者的佐证。这符合单一低质量图像且无佐证证据的校准基准，使普通解释的可能性极高。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件通过大面积黑条删节，存在大量隐匿信息。图像的大部分区域，包括顶部、左侧和右侧，均被完全遮蔽。这些删节超出了常规的姓名/代号删节范围，隐藏了关于照片的重要背景信息，例如环境、拍摄平台或其他识别细节。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO
Report included a still image derived from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
No accompanying mission report was provided
Operator was unable to positively identify the UAP
Date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
Image shows one to two small, dark, indistinct objects
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像
原始图像经过了编辑删节
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像中的日期因系统日期/时间未设置而有误
图像显示一至两个小型、黑暗、模糊的物体
bust_explanations: Bird, bat, or insect at close range: The object is described as small, dark, and indistinct, which is highly consistent with an out-of-focus animal close to the camera lens.
Lens flare or camera artifact: Given the single visual modality and the indistinct nature of the object, it could easily be an internal reflection, dust on the lens, or a digital artifact.
Consumer drone (DJI / quadcopter): A small drone, especially if at a distance or out of focus, could appear as a small, dark, indistinct blob against the sky.
bust_explanations_zh: 近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：该物体被描述为小型、黑暗且模糊，这与靠近相机镜头且失焦的动物高度一致。
镜头眩光或相机伪影：鉴于单一视觉模式和物体模糊的性质，它很容易是内部反射、镜头上的灰尘或数字伪影。
消费级无人机 (DJI / 四轴飞行器)：小型无人机，尤其是在远距离或失焦的情况下，在天空中可能表现为小型、黑暗、模糊的一团。
cover_up_indicators: Large black redaction bar spanning the top of the image
Three black redaction bars on the left side of the image
Three black redaction bars on the right side of the image
cover_up_indicators_zh: 图像顶部有一条大型黑色删节条
图像左侧有三条黑色删节条
图像右侧有三条黑色删节条
